description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the uelen/archlinux-wayless:latest Docker image, caching the target/, cargo/, and xargo/ directories, and defining CARGO_HOME and XARGO_HOME variables pointing to the project’s cargo and xargo folders. Define three stages: build, test, and run. In the build stage add a make job that runs rustc --version && cargo --version, sets PATH to include $CARGO_HOME/bin and ~/.cargo/bin, then executes make. In the test stage add a test job that sets the same PATH and runs make test. In the run stage add a run job that sets PATH, runs make, then runs timeout 80 make nographic piping output to a file and finally checks the last 20 lines of the output for the string "FIN" and echoes "Successfully ran" if found.
